escalate: ESC retroactive discount/price adjustment inquiries immediately
ESC if stylists/salons want to carry the products
templates: For any q's about affiliate links, commissions, or salon referral links, use AFQ shortcut
All of the products are unisex, use USX shortcut
drive_to_purchase: Ask the cx what their hair concerns are before making a recommendation!
Make recommendations when cx has specific inquiry, don't send the quiz!
For full haircare regimen inquiries, recommend shampoo, conditioner, and at least one or two other products recommended that align with their need
promo_and_exclusions: When sending a code provide more detail about what the code is valid for!
When sending the promo/code end date, include the time the offer expires as well!

Hello! I was wondering if anyone has taken a look into my account? I still have not heard back from anyone.
R+Co: Thanks for following up! I'm still waiting to hear back from the team, and I'll be sure to text you the minute I do. Thanks so much for your patience.
Thank you! 😊
R+Co: You're welcome! I'll be in touch.

R+Co: Thanks for your patience! I just heard from the team, and we understand how important this is. We adjusted the points back. The balance is now 2,948. If you have any further questions or need assistance, please don't hesitate to contact me. We're here to help!

I appreciate the help. The problem is that I was a Supernova and had enough points to use a 30% off discount with 1000 of them. That's not showing up on my account, not is it allowing me to use my rewards for the 30% off.
*nor
They put my status back to Grm
Gem

Ok, great! Thank you!

If you have any further questions or need assistance, please don't hesitate to contact me. We're here to help!
Thank you! I will use the code. Will they fix my rewards account so I can use my discounts in the future?

I appreciate all your help! I've emailed them with no response. You're literally the only one who has been helping me in any way.

R+Co: I am very happy to assist you! I will continue monitoring your situation and do my best to ensure everything is resolved in the best way for you. As soon as I receive a response from the team, I will send you a message.

Why can't I get emails from Birkenstock?

Birkenstock: I understand your concern. Just to confirm, have you subscribed to our marketing alerts? If so, have you checked your spam and promo folders to see if our promotional emails are there? Please let me know, I'm here to help!
I have been trying to change my password to my account and haven't gotten a new link to change it. I also find it odd that I haven't gotten any promotional emails either.

Birkenstock: I'm sorry to hear that! To troubleshoot, can you try using a private/incognito window where no data is stored? As sometimes the data stored in your browser can also cause issues. Let me know how it goes.
Well since I have no idea what that means, it seems I am out of luck.
Birkenstock: I'm sorry to hear that! May I have your email address? I'll be happy to check this with my team.
sarlett@comcast.net
Birkenstock: Thanks for sending that over. Can you please share your full name as well?
Cindy Scott
Birkenstock: Thank you for the information. I have already sent your concern to our team. Make sure to check your SMS for updates. I'll be in touch!
Thank you!
Birkenstock: No worries. Make sure to check your SMS for updates. I'll be in touch!

Birkenstock: Shoes, for when it's not sandal weather. Shop extra coverage & contoured 
support: birkenstock.attn.tv/a_ONHLb9P6Qe .

Birkenstock: 54 people recently purchased the Oita Braided Suede, complete your order before it disappears!

Use code ATSHIP-W3K5-P96X-BKNF-WN52H for free ground shipping & free returns for 30 days.

Shop now: https://birkenstock.attn.tv/aKBexVVqhhzH . 🌟

Birkenstock: Thanks for your patience! I just heard from the team and we're sorry that you were experiencing difficulties resetting your password. We have requested to reset your password, and you should receive an email to reset your password shortly. In the event that you do not receive that email, here is a temporary password that can be used to log into your account:

rDMSqcLCBi

Once you are in your account, you can go to "My Profile" and change your password. Let me know if you need further assistance.

Thank you. I didn't know who the email was from so I didn't click on anything. It's hard to determine what's a scam and what isn't. Will I get emails from Birkenstock once my password has been changed?

Birkenstock: I completely understand your concerns about phishing emails and scams! Once you successfully change your password, you will receive a confirmation email from Birkenstock. You should also receive updates from us if you've signed up for email alerts. If you ever have doubts, feel free to double-check the sender's email address, as it should be from an official Birkenstock domain.

If you need any more assistance or have other questions, feel free to reach out!
I changed the password but had to go to the website. I tried to click on the link but got a message that said "You have been blocked". I also did not receive a confirmation email.

Birkenstock: I'm sorry about that! First, I might suggest trying a different internet browser, as certain ones have issues with ecommerce stores. Please also check your spam and promo folders as sometimes our emails end up there.
I used to get emails all the time!
